summary: In the last 24 hours, Ukraine reportedly destroyed a Russian Malva self-propelled gun using an FPV drone, and set a world record with the first-ever FPV drone strike on a Russian warship at over 350 kilometers away. Ukraine is testing FPV drones specifically targeting anti-drone electronic warfare systems, while a Ukrainian company is producing exploding unjammable drones designed to counter Russian electronic warfare. Reports indicate that Russia’s fiber optic drones are flooding the battlefield, prompting Ukraine to race to catch up, and Ukrainian troops are now moving with caution due to unjammable drones leaving wires everywhere.
